summary: Tested Multilevel Stock Visualization & Stock Difference Registration features. All 13 backend tests passed. All 12 UI features verified via Playwright.

issues: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for {DialogContent} - accessibility enhancement suggested

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stock/multilevel returns 200 with stock list
Backend: Response contains all required fields (ingredient_id, ingredient_name, stock_detailed, stock_in_purchase_units, stock_remainder_dispatch, dispatch_unit_cost, etc.)
Backend: stock_detailed format is correct (e.g., '18 lb + 0.35 lb')
Backend: Conversion relation calculated correctly (stock = purchase_units * conversion_factor + remainder)
Backend: Filter by warehouse_id works correctly
Backend: POST /api/stock/difference for 'faltante' decreases stock correctly
Backend: POST /api/stock/difference for 'sobrante' increases stock correctly
Backend: Conversion applied correctly when using purchase unit
Backend: Monetary value calculated correctly (quantity × dispatch_unit_cost)
Backend: Difference audit logging works (authorized_by_name recorded)
Backend: GET /api/stock/differences returns logs with stats
Backend: Stats include total_faltante_value, total_sobrante_value, net_difference
Frontend: Stock tab shows 'Stock Multinivel & Diferencias' title
Frontend: Table has 'Stock Detallado' column
Frontend: Stock breakdown shows multi-level (e.g., '70 unidad > 0.15 unidad', '18 lb > 0.35 lb', '96 botella')
Frontend: Each row shows conversion relation (e.g., '1 lb = 1 lb', '1 botella = 1 botella')
Frontend: 'Diferencia' button visible in each stock row
Frontend: Dialog opens with correct title 'Registrar Diferencia de Inventario'
Frontend: Dialog shows ingredient name and current stock
Frontend: Faltante/Sobrante type buttons work
Frontend: Quantity input and Unit selector (Despacho/Compra) present
Frontend: Monetary value auto-calculated and displayed
Frontend: Reason selector with multiple options (Conteo físico, Producto dañado, etc.)
Frontend: Admin authorization info message displayed
Frontend: Registration updates stock table and recent movements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multilevel Stock & Difference Registration features fully working. Key endpoints: GET /api/stock/multilevel (returns stock with breakdown into purchase/dispatch units), POST /api/stock/difference (registers faltante/sobrante with auto monetary calculation). Stock tab in Inventory Manager shows table with 'Stock Detallado' column displaying cascading breakdown (e.g., 18 lb > 0.35 lb). Each row has 'Diferencia' button that opens dialog for registering differences with type selection, quantity, unit (Despacho/Compra), reason selector, and auto-calculated monetary value. Audit logs stored in stock_difference_logs collection.

stock_detailed_column.display_format: Purchase Units > Dispatch Remainder (e.g., 18 lb > 0.35 lb)

difference_button.location: Acciones column in each stock row

difference_dialog.title: Registrar Diferencia de Inventario
sections: Ingredient info with current stock breakdown
Cantidad input + Unidad de Entrada selector (Despacho/Compra)
Razón de la Diferencia selector (8 options)

monetary_value_calculation.conversion_applied: When using purchase unit, multiplied by conversion_factor

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
